node.statement: Upper product bound: ||a•b|| <= (1+C eta)||a|| ||b||. For a,b in A: a•b=P(a o b), so ||a•b||=||P(a o b)|| <= ||P|| * ||a o b|| (definition of operator norm of P, valid since a o b in B(H)_sa). By GT-Pprops ||P||<=1+C eta. By GT-jb-submult (HOS 3.1.3, V=B(H)_sa a JB algebra by GT-bhsa-jc) ||a o b|| <= ||a|| ||b||. Combining: ||a•b|| <= (1+C eta) ||a|| ||b||. (C is the universal constant from GT-Pprops, dimension-free.)
